### Product Updates & Partnership Progress

- Updated No Loss Perps docs now live with explainer videos

- New mechanism targeting meme coin shorting (unique in DeFi)
- Partnering with launchpads rather than building own product
- Unlocks meme coin shorting unavailable elsewhere
- Partnership developments:

- StreamSwap: 90% complete, revenue from day zero potential
- JMoon: Meme coin launchpad interested, 2-3 weeks to testnet
- CEI (EVM L1): Milestone-oriented grant opportunity (deprioritized)
- Revenue model: 50/50 split initially, scaling to 60/40, 70/30

- Target all meme coin launchpads: Monad → Arbitrum/Base → Solana
- Self-funded model with token distribution based on revenue share

### Team Progress & Technical Status

- Monad testnet live, needs design/engagement improvements
- Development updates:

- Apur: Liquidity tracking, rebalancing research, trade preview contract bug fixes
- Vedanta: Decimal fixes, close position logic, front-end improvements
- Sidhanth: Discord ready, points program planned, social media hiring needed
- Keshav: Design improvements, pro trader mockups needed for partnerships
- Notion tracking system to be implemented for transparency

### Funding Strategy & Next Steps

- If no VC raise in 2 months, public raise via StreamSwap

- Target: $500k raise for TimeLoop Trade (not TimeLoop Meme)
- Post-Monad mainnet launch with financial engineering tokenomics
- Revenue sharing + token incentives for depositors
- Staying with Monad for testnet advantages and organic user testing

- Real users vs dead testnets on other chains
- Social support and liquidity provision benefits
- Team action items:

- All members: Start posting about TimeLoop on social media
- Keshav: Create pro trader UI mockups, find design intern
- Sidhanth: Launch community posts, hire social media support
- Everyone: Update Notion progress tracking
